body.content: Area-16 “The Underground” reached a major milestone in mid-June after recording a new peak player count of 75 concurrent players, marking one of the highest concurrent player counts the custom server has seen to date.

The achievement comes on the back of the steady growth of this community since its launch and many relaunches, showing an increasing interest in Area-16’s unique approach to SCP: Roleplay custom servers.

body.alt: Screenshot of Area-16 teased map update.

body.content: In an interview with the Factions Hub News Team, Area-16’s owner, *Foxie_634* (989872694285697054), said the server’s long-term vision extends beyond simply growing its player base. They went on to explain that the team is working on original, unique maps and expanding on custom lore, pushing for immersive roleplay and enjoyable experiences for all players.

Reflecting on the milestone, *Foxie_634* described Area-16 as the result of years of learning and refinement, going through multiple different names and styles, before being adapted into what it is today. It is clear that this evolution over time has had a strongly positive impact.

With ambitious plans, a growing community, and a sharp focus on advancing the community forward, Area-16’s future undoubtedly looks promising. Perhaps someday soon, we will see this community achieve another great milestone: verified status in the SCP: Roleplay Factions Hub.
